brief_summary: Four-stage process strip showing the interest check's current stage (terracotta, filled) followed by the announced GB window opening July 15, 2026, the GB window closing August 12, 2026 (both dashed-outline, calendar-confirmed), and a final unconfirmed production stage (lightly dashed, hedged) that depends on the buy clearing MOQ.
